tr.td:
Hello , The document has been signed by
()
without the requested extra-authentification step () because you don't have enough credits for this operation. The signatory was able to finish signing, but was not asked to authenticate fully.
If you wish, you can request the document again after buying more credits for the operation.
If you do not want to receive these notifications anymore, you can disable the extra-authentication step in the
Sign > Configuration > Roles
menu.
